message.content:
1. The first element in the top-left corner is the 'CircuitDesign' logo (text), not a hamburger menu.  
2. The tabs row has its own background (light gray) and is visually separated from the header bar (white) by a thin border.  
3. Below the tabs, there is another toolbar row with simulation controls (stop, pause, settings icons) and a "Build Simulatable Part" button; its background is light gray.  
4. The canvas background is pure white, with no visible grid.  
5. ARDUINO BOARD DETAILS:  
   - PCB color: Teal/cyan blue.  
   - "UNO" text is visible.  
   - USB connector: Left side.  
   - DC power jack: Visible (bottom-left).  
   - Pin headers: Black.  
   - Chips/ICs: Yes (small black components).  
6. LDR SENSOR: Small PCB with a round sensor element; sensor element is orange/brown.  
7. LCD MODULE:  
   - Backlight: Green.  
   - Text: "Room Dark" (line 1), "Lux 1.03" (line 2).  
   - PCB behind LCD: Green.  
   - Pins visible: 16 (top and bottom).  
8. BREADBOARD: Not visible.  
9. WIRES:  
   - Red wire: From Arduino top-right (pin row) → right → up → to LDR top-right.  
   - Blue wire: From Arduino top-right (pin row) → right → up → to LDR top-left.  
   - Black wire: From Arduino bottom-left (GND pin) → down → left → to LDR bottom-left.  
   - Light blue wire: From Arduino top-left (pin row) → left → up → to LDR bottom-right.  
   - Red wire: From Arduino bottom-right (5V pin) → down → right → to LCD bottom-left.  
   - Black wire: From Arduino bottom-right (GND pin) → down → right → to LCD bottom-right.  
   - Blue wire: From Arduino top-right (pin row) → right → up → to LCD top-left.  
10. Exact email: austin@cirkitdesign.com.  
11. Visible window chrome/frame: Yes (light gray border around the app).  
12. Status bar at bottom: No.
